mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_account(account, password_hash, real_name, gender, class_id, status, create_time) VALUES(#{account}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{classId}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT student_id, account, password_hash, real_name, gender, phone, class_id, status, create_time FROM student_account
SELECT student_id, account, password_hash, real_name, gender, phone, class_id, status, create_time FROM student_account ORDER BY student_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT student_id, account, password_hash, real_name, gender, phone, class_id, status, create_time FROM student_account WHERE CONCAT(account, real_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY student_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_account WHERE CONCAT(account, real_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
